Gate  

Description

1: Gate

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 70 Skill: Alteration
Casting Time: 5 Recast Time: 8
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Range: 0
Location: Any Time of Day: Any
Fizzle Adj: 25 Deletable: Yes
Blockable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: Yes Interruptable: Yes
Target Type: Self Spell Type: Beneficial
Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on other: Soandso fades away.

Game Description

Opens a magical portal that returns you to your bind point.

Items with this effect

  • 10 Dose Gate Potion
  • 5 Dose Gate Potion
  • Adventurer's Portal of Escape
  • Adventurer's Portals of Escape
  • Asherah's Torch of Guidance
  • Bulwark of Many Portals
  • Bulwark of Many Portals
  • Bulwark of Many Portals
  • Cape of Forbidden Ceremonies
  • Celestial Sword
  • Circle of Smoke
  • Dabner's Staff of Recall
  • Drink in Case of Emergency
  • Fabled Circle of Smoke
  • Gate Potion
  • Grand Adventurer's Repellant
  • Mighty Adventurer's Repellant
  • Philter of Major Translocation
  • Spell: Gate
  • Spell: Gate
  • Spell: Gate
  • Staff of Guidance
  • Supreme Adventurer's Repellant
  • Swirling Blue Potion
  • Translated Glyph of the Damned
  • Vial of Swirling Mist
  • Vial of Swirling Smoke

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Gate
Spell: Gate
Spell: Gate
ClassLevel
NEC4
SHM5
ENC4
CLR5
WIZ4
DRU5
MAG4
Expansion:

Duration:
Instant

# Apr 03 2005 at 8:49 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1678666615266
45 posts
Is there some way to set the bind point?
▲ Page top
RE: Gate
QuoteReply
# Oct 25 2005 at 9:52 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591838885107
2 posts
i think /charinfo will tell you your bind poin
▲ Page top
RE: Gate
QuoteReply
# Jul 07 2005 at 11:00 PM Rating: Decent
Reyla
Scholar
1,074 posts
Yes, with the spell Bind Affinity. Cst it yourself or have it cast on you if you are in a location that allows binding. Usually cities, PoK and newbie area type places.

After 16 years, I'm not listing every friggin character.

# Jan 10 2004 at 6:39 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591782204161
10 posts
You can get ALL your shammy level 5 spells from the same guy... Mystic Goharkor in POK - in the floor you enter from. Iksar guy...
▲ Page top
Ak'Anon loc
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2003 at 4:11 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591789974715
Scholar
258 posts
Spell is sold by the clockwork merchant selling general spells. Merchant is standing near Nonnie Texaker at loc +1072 -1000 in the enchant/mage/wizard guildhall in Ak'Anon.

Edited, Fri Oct 17 01:18:09 2003
▲ Page top
Potion?
QuoteReply
# Jun 19 2003 at 10:03 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591785164132
3 posts
I understand the spell is interruptable, but is the potion as well?

TIA
▲ Page top
RE: Potion?
QuoteReply
# Jun 20 2003 at 12:13 PM Rating: Good
__DEL__1592245745802
View User Forum
Sage
950 posts
The potion you buy at vendors (vial of swirling smoke, like 1100pp) is instant cast and therefore not interruptable.

The potion that is made by players (gate potion)has a cast time and is interruptable.
▲ Page top
Sold at vendors
QuoteReply
# May 11 2003 at 9:11 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1710116187551
Scholar
44 posts

▲ Page top
such a basic spell yet so wanted
QuoteReply
# Feb 08 2003 at 11:56 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591781903857
1 post
hirr....

there should be some more items with this item.
being a melee i would love to have a triggered item that could gate me.

for instance...
im bound in the nexus and my c3 runs out, i gate back get c3 and voila back in action.

instead of running to the pop book or waiting for nexus circle to activate or getting hold of a druid/wizard.
